TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cicala'ay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 537 buwan, 1,368 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 23% kyan ku 309 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 77% kyan ku 1,059 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 18%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cicala'ay hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cicala'ay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cicala'ay hya' ga Ku'ang sang go. tay mkraya' na Cicala'ay hya' ga Hualien. tay mkyahu' na Cicala'ay hya' ga Ciataw. tay 'zil na Cicala'ay hya' ga Dihekoay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cicala'ay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cicala'ay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ikekami ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiataw. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa *iħekoaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Cicala'ay ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 537 buwan, 1,368 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 23% kyan ku 309 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 77% kyan ku 1,059 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 18%, Bunun 2%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cicala'ay hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Cicala'ay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Cicala'ay hya' ga Ku'ang sang go. tay mkraya' na Cicala'ay hya' ga Hualien. tay mkyahu' na Cicala'ay hya' ga Ciataw. tay 'zil na Cicala'ay hya' ga Dihekoay. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Cicala'ay ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Cicala'ay ga ungat pqwasan biru. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu ikekami ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa ws~ɕiluŋ kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiataw. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ħjaʔ ɣa *iħekoaj. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan qalaŋ ʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨalaʔaj ɣa uŋat pqwas~ɕan βiru. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
